reviews.comment:
Soy socia hace muchos años del ACA.
Fui a cargar nafta, hasta ahí todo bien.
Le pedí al playero si me podía limpiar el parabrisas, me dijo que si, que tenía que esperar porque estaban usando el secador. Digo OK. Pasa el tiempo y le pregunto que pasaba que tardaba tanto?? Me volvió a decir que estaban ocupandolo. Voy a ver y reclamarlo y veo a un cliente no solo limpiando los parabrisas sino todo el auto prácticamente. Se lo pido a este señor y me dice que todavía no finalizaba. Le digo al playero si no había otro y le explico la situación y me dice que no! Que se los roban!! Por eso tienen 1 solo!! Y para colmo el que estaba limpiando su auto no era socio. Una vergüenza ACA el servicio !! Bien cuando uno se atraza en la cuota te persiguen por cielo y tierra!!

(Translated by Google)
I've been an ACA member for many years.
I went to get gas, so far so good.
I asked the attendant if he could clean my windshield, and he said yes, that I had to wait because they were using the dryer. I said, "Okay." Time passes, and I ask him what was taking so long? He told me again that they were using it. I go to check and complain, and I see a customer not only cleaning the windshield but practically the entire car. I ask this man, and he tells me he hasn't finished yet. I ask the attendant if there isn't another one and explain the situation, and he says no! They steal them! That's why they only have one! And to top it off, the person cleaning his car wasn't a member. The ACA service is disgraceful! When you're late on your payment, they'll chase you down!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15003011604838907149/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhb015NU1BEAE
